name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR11AdvancedDisease
title: Offer neoadjuvant chemotherapy for inflammatory or locally advanced disease
description: Initial multidisciplinary treatment planning for invasive nonmetastatic breast cancer.

action.description: Use neoadjuvant chemotherapy as the treatment of choice for inflammatory breast cancer or unresectable locally advanced disease that may become resectable.

documentation.citation: Neoadjuvant chemotherapy is the treatment of choice for inflammatory breast cancer or unresectable locally advanced disease that may become resectable. action.title: Offer neoadjuvant chemotherapy for inflammatory or locally advanced disease
